steps: A1[FleetView Analytics Portal - Repair Completion Notification] A2[FleetView VIM - Vehicle Inspection Requested] B1[SAP S/4HANA - Invoice Validation] A3[FleetView VIM - Inspection Result Received] B2[SAP S/4HANA - Invoice Payment Approval] A4[FleetView VIM - Update Maintenance Records] C1[OutSystems Platform - Notification to Client] B3[SAP S/4HANA - GL Journal Entry] C2[OutSystems Platform - Client Feedback Request] A5[FleetView VIM - Vehicle Released for Service] C3[OutSystems Platform - Final Client Communication]

name: Unscheduled Repair Root Cause Analysis
systems: FleetView, SAP S/4HANA, Wheels Telematics/IoT Platform
steps: FleetView VIM - Trigger Order SAP S/4HANA - Post Invoice FleetView - Roadside Assistance Dispatch Wheels Telematics/IoT Platform - Data Collection FleetView Analytics Portal - Root Cause Analysis FleetView - Corrective Action Plan Creation SAP S/4HANA - Update Asset Record FleetView - Feedback Collection

name: WEX Fuel Card Issuance and Driver Assignment
systems: FleetView, SAP S/4HANA, WEX Fuel Card API
steps: FleetView VIM - Driver Onboarded SAP S/4HANA - Validate Driver Details WEX API - Create Fuel Card Request FleetView - Assign Fuel Card to Driver Salesforce - Update Case Status FleetView - Driver Notification SAP S/4HANA - Post Invoice

name: Fuel Card Policy Limits and Controls Configuration
systems: FleetView, SAP S/4HANA, WEX Fuel Card API
steps: FleetView - Policy Request Received FleetView - Validate Policy Request SAP S/4HANA - Update Policy Limits WEX API - Update Fuel Card Settings FleetView - Notify Stakeholders FleetView - Monitor Policy Compliance FleetView - Generate Compliance Report SAP S/4HANA - Update Financial Records

name: Transaction Monitoring and Fraud Detection via WEX API
systems: FleetView, SAP S/4HANA, WEX Fuel Card API
steps: WEX API - Transaction Data Received SAP S/4HANA - Transaction Records Created WEX API - Fraud Detection Engine Activated WEX API - Fraud Alert Fired FleetView Analytics Portal - Fraud Alert Reviewed SAP S/4HANA - Fraudulent Transactions Reversed WEX API - Fraudulent Transactions Reported FleetView Analytics Portal - Fraud Management Dashboard Updated FleetView - Fraud Summary Report Generated

name: IFTA Mileage-by-Jurisdiction Report Generation
systems: FleetView, SAP S/4HANA, Informatica
steps: FleetView - Monthly Data Extraction Initiated SAP S/4HANA - Data Integration Initiated Informatica - Data Transformation Process FleetView - Report Generation Initiated SAP S/4HANA - Post Report Integration Fuel Programme Manager - Review and Approval

name: Fuel Exception Alert Review and Driver Follow-Up
systems: FleetView, WEX Fuel Card API
steps: Alert Review - WEX API - Fraud Alert Fired Review Fraud Alert - FleetView - View Details Conduct Initial Follow-Up - FleetView Mobile App - Send Message Receive Driver Response - FleetView - Log Response Analyze Response - WEX API - Investigate Transactions Prepare Follow-Up Action Plan - FleetView - Generate Action Plan Execute Action Plan - FleetView Mobile App - Send Instructions Close Alert - FleetView - Update Record
